title: senecio buglossa
intro: Senecio buglossa, also known as Groundsel Tree, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to the southwestern United States, Mexico, and parts of Central America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, reduce inflammation, and aid in digestion. The health benefits of Senecio buglossa include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Senecio buglossa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be carefully considered due to potential toxicity and side effects.
